import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint"

import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema"

import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate"

<Heading as={"h1"} className={"openapi__heading"} children={"Create Verification Flow for Native Apps"}></Heading>

<MethodEndpoint method={"get"} path={"/self-service/verification/api"} context={"endpoint"}></MethodEndpoint>

This endpoint initiates a verification flow for API clients such as mobile devices, smart TVs, and so on.

To fetch an existing verification flow call `/self-service/verification/flows?flow=<flow_id>`.

You MUST NOT use this endpoint in client-side (Single Page Apps, ReactJS, AngularJS) nor server-side (Java Server Pages, NodeJS,
PHP, Golang, ...) browser applications. Using this endpoint in these applications will make you vulnerable to a variety of CSRF
attacks.

This endpoint MUST ONLY be used in scenarios such as native mobile apps (React Native, Objective C, Swift, Java, ...).

More information can be found at
[Ory Email and Phone Verification Documentation](https://www.ory.com/docs/kratos/self-service/flows/verify-email-account-activation).

<Heading id={"request"} as={"h2"} className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>
